issues.detail: Instructions contain placeholders and lack full context, making them ambiguous.
Error scenarios and edge cases are not addressed in the instructions.
Runnable code blocks have placeholders and missing steps, reducing direct actionability.

scenarios.name: full-aws-audit
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a more detailed scan and a cleanup script skeleton, whereas Response B only offers a high‑level playbook without the required report or safe‑cleanup script.

scenarios.name: targeted-ebs-cleanup-us-west-2
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items (listing details, dry-run/execute/force options, snapshot creation, tagging) but misses cost and confirmation; Response B lacks cost, tagging, dry-run/execute/force, and snapshot creation.
